revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Tang dynasty topics |title = [[Tang dynasty]] topics |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Joueuse de polo Tang Guimet 29101.jpg|120px|A ceramic female polo player]]
|group1 = History ([[Timeline of the Tang dynasty|Timeline]]) |list1 = * [[Transition from Sui to Tang]] * [[Xuanwu Gate Incident]] * [[Tang campaign against the Eastern Turks|Tang–Eastern Turks War]] * [[Emperor Taizong's campaign against Xueyantuo|Tang–Xueyantuo War]] * [[Goguryeo–Tang War]] * [[Baekje–Tang War]] * [[Silla–Tang War]] * [[Tang–Tibet relations]] * [[Tang campaigns against the Western Turks|Tang–Western Turks War]] ** [[Tang campaign against the oasis states|Oasis states]] ** [[Tang campaign against Karakhoja|Karakhoja]] ** [[Tang campaigns against Karasahr|Karasahr]] ** [[Tang campaign against Kucha|Kucha]] ** [[Conquest of the Western Turks|Conquest]] * [[Battle of Talas]] * [[An Lushan rebellion]] * [[Peace treaty between China and Tibet (783)|Qingshui Treaty]] * [[Niu–Li factional strife]] * [[Changqing Treaty]] * [[Sweet Dew incident]] * [[Nanzhao#Territorial_expansion|Tang-Nanzhao conflicts]] ** [[Tang-Nanzhao conflicts in Annan|Annan]] ** [[Siege of Songping|Songping]] * [[Huang Chao Rebellion]]
|group2 = Government |list2 = * [[Emperor of China|Emperor]] ** [[List of emperors of the Tang dynasty|List]] ** [[House of Li|House]] ** [[Family_tree_of_Chinese_monarchs_(middle)#Tang_and_Wu_Zhou_dynasties|Family tree]] * [[Chancellor of the Tang dynasty|Chancellor]] * [[Administrative divisions of the Tang dynasty|Administrative divisions]] ** [[Jimi system]] ** [[Fanzhen]] *** [[Three Fanzhen of Hebei|Hebei]] * [[Imperial_examination#Tang_dynasty_(618–907)|Imperial examination]]s * [[Tang official headwear|Official headwear]] * [[Military history of the Tang dynasty|Military]] ** [[Jiedushi]] ** [[Imperial Guards (Tang dynasty)|Imperial guards]] ** [[Shence Army]] ** [[Bureau of Military Affairs|Shumiyuan]] ** [[Turks in the Tang military|Turkic generals]]
{{Navbox |child |groupstyle = text-align: center; |group1=[[Three_Departments_and_Six_Ministries#Three_Departments|Three Departments]] |list1= *[[Department of State Affairs]] *[[Zhongshu Sheng|Secretariat]] *[[Menxia Sheng|Chancellery]] *([[Secretariat-Chancellery]])
|group2=[[Three_Departments_and_Six_Ministries#Six_Ministries|Six Ministries]] |list2= # [[Ministry of Personnel]] # [[Ministry of Revenue (imperial China)|Ministry of Revenue]] # [[Ministry of Rites]] # [[Ministry of War (imperial China)|Ministry of War]] # [[Ministry of Justice (imperial China)|Ministry of Justice]] # [[Ministry of Works (imperial China)|Ministry of Works]]
|group3=Protectorates |list3= * [[Tang dynasty in Inner Asia]] ** [[Protectorate General to Pacify the West]] *** [[Four Garrisons of Anxi]] ** [[Beiting Protectorate]] ** [[Protectorate General to Pacify the North]] ** [[Protectorate General to Pacify the South]] ** [[Protectorate General to Pacify the East]] *** [[Ungjin Commandery]] *** [[Gyerim Territory Area Command]] }}
|group3 = Culture |list3 = * [[Tang dynasty art|Art]] * [[Sancai]] * [[Tang poetry|Poetry]] ** ''[[Three Hundred Tang Poems]]'' * [[Playing_card#China|Playing card]] * ''[[A Palace Concert]]'' * ''[[Emperor Taizong Receiving the Tibetan Envoy]]'' * ''[[Huaisu's Autobiography]]'' * ''[[Night-Shining White]]'' * [[Companion statues: Kashyapa and Ananda|Kashyapa & Ananda]] * [[Six Steeds of Zhao Mausoleum]] ** [[Autumn Dew]] * [[Dazu Rock Carvings]] * [[Leshan Giant Buddha]] * [[Rongxian Giant Buddha]] * [[Thousand-Buddha Cliff]]
{{Navbox |child |groupstyle = text-align: center; |group1=Writers |list1= * [[Daoxuan]] (596–667) ** ''[[Standard Design for Buddhist Temple Construction]]'' * [[Empress Zhangsun]] (601–636) * [[Bianji]] (7th c.) ** ''[[Great Tang Records on the Western Regions]]'' * [[Du Huan]] (751–762) * [[Bai Xingjian]] (776–826) ** ''[[The Tale of Li Wa]]'' * [[Lu Yu]] (733–804) ** ''[[The Classic of Tea]]'' * [[Du Guangting]] (850–933) * [[Yang Yunsong]] (9th c.) ** ''[[Green Satchel Classic]]''
|group2=[[Three_Hundred_Tang_Poems#Poets|Poets]] |list2= * [[Luo Binwang]] (619–684) * [[Du Shenyan]] (645–708) * [[Wang Bo (poet)|Wang Bo]] (650–676) * [[Chen Zi'ang]] (656–702) * [[He Zhizhang]] (659–744) * [[Zhang Jiuling]] (673–740) * [[Meng Haoran]] (689–740) * [[Li Qi (poet)|Li Qi]] (690–751) * [[Wang Changling]] (698–756) * [[Wang Wei (Tang dynasty)|Wang Wei]] (699–759) * [[Li Bai]] (701–762) * [[Gao Shi]] (704–765) * [[Liu Zhangqing]] (709–785) * [[Du Fu]] (712–770) * [[Zhang Ji (poet from Hubei)|Zhang Ji]] (712–779) * [[Cen Shen]] (715–770) * [[Li Bi]] (722–789) * [[Wei Yingwu]] (737–792) * [[Lu Lun]] (739–799) * [[Han Yu]] (768–824) * [[Liu Yuxi]] (772–842) * [[Bai Juyi]] (772–846) * [[Liu Zongyuan]] (773–819) * [[Yuan Zhen]] (779–831) * [[Li Ye (poet)|Li Ye]] (d. 784) * [[Li He]] (790–817) * [[Niu Yingzhen]] (8th c.) * [[Zhang Xu]] (8th c.) * [[Du Mu]] (803–852) * [[Wen Tingyun]] (812–866) * [[Li Shangyin]] (813–858) * [[Mo Xuanqing]] (834-?) * [[Yu Xuanji]] (840–868) * [[Du Qiuniang]] (9th c.) * [[Liêu Hữu Phương]] (9th c.) |group3=[[Tang dynasty painting|Painters]] |list3= * [[Yan Liben]] (600–673) * [[Wu Daozi]] (680–760) * [[Wang Wei (Tang dynasty)|Wang Wei]] (699–759) * [[Viśa Īrasangä]] (7th c.) * [[Han Gan]] (706–783) * [[Zhang Xuan]] (713–755) * [[Han Huang]] (723–787) * [[Zhou Fang (Tang dynasty)|Zhou Fang]] (730–780) * [[Guanxiu]] (832–912) * [[Jing Hao]] (855–915) * [[Sun Wei (painter)|Sun Wei]] (9th c.) }}
|group4 = Religion |list4 =
{{Navbox |child |groupstyle = text-align: center; |group1=[[Chinese_Buddhism#Tang_Dynasty_(618–907_CE)|Buddhism]] |list1= * [[Jizang]] (549–623) * [[Daochuo]] (562–645) * [[Shandao]] (613–681) * [[Xuanzang]] (fl 602–664) * [[Kuiji]] (632–682) * [[Yijing (monk)|Yijing]] (635–713) * [[Faru (monk)|Faru]] (638–689) * [[Vajrabodhi]] (671–741) * [[Jianzhen]] (688–763) * [[Amoghavajra]] (705–774) * [[Mazu Daoyi]] (709–788) * [[Baizhang Huaihai]] (720–814) * [[Wukong (monk)|Wukong]] (730–790) * [[Yaoshan Weiyan]] (745–827) * [[Huiguo]] (746–805) * [[Puhua]] (770–860) * [[Zhaozhou Congshen]] (778–897) * [[Zhisheng]] (8th c.) * [[Dongshan Liangjie]] (807–869) * [[Yunmen Wenyan]] (862–949) * [[Gikū]] (9th c.)
|group2=[[History_of_Taoism#Tang_Dynasty_(618–907)|Taoism]] |list2= * [[Cheng Xuanying]] (fl 631–655) * [[Lü Dongbin]] (796-?)
|group3=[[Confucianism]] |list3= * [[Neo-Confucianism]] ** [[Han Yu]] (768–824) ** [[Li Ao (philosopher)|Li Ao]] (772–841) *[[Kong Yingda]] (574–648)
|group4=Other |list4= * [[Church of the East in China|Church of the East]] ** [[Xi'an Stele]] * [[Islam during the Tang dynasty]] * [[Chinese Manichaeism]]
}}
|group5 = [[Science and technology of the Tang dynasty|Science and technology]] |list5 = * [[Wang Xiaotong]] (580–640) ** ''[[Jigu Suanjing]]'' * [[Xu Jingzong]] (592-672) * [[Liang Lingzan]] ** ''The Five-Planet and Twenty-eight Constellation Deities'' * [[Li Chunfeng]] (602–670) ** ''[[Ten Computational Canons]]'' * Su Jing ** ''[[Xinxiu bencao]]'' * [[Sun Simiao]] (d. 682) * [[Yi Xing]] (683–727) * [[Gautama Siddha]] (fl 714–724) ** ''[[Treatise on Astrology of the Kaiyuan Era]]'' * [[Jia Dan]] (730–805) * [[Toothbrush]] * [[Woodblock printing]]
|group6 = Economy |list6 = * [[Diwu Qi]] * [[Liu Yan (Tang dynasty)|Liu Yan]] * [[Kaiyuan Tongbao]] * [[Salt Commission]] * [[Flying cash]]
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Tang dynasty templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
revision.text:
{{Navbox |name = Tang dynasty topics |title = [[Tang dynasty]] topics |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |listclass = hlist |image = [[File:Joueuse de polo Tang Guimet 29101.jpg|120px|A ceramic female polo player]]
|group1 = History ([[Timeline of the Tang dynasty|Timeline]]) |list1 = * [[Transition from Sui to Tang]] * [[Xuanwu Gate Incident]] * [[Tang campaign against the Eastern Turks|Tang–Eastern Turks War]] * [[Emperor Taizong's campaign against Xueyantuo|Tang–Xueyantuo War]] * [[Goguryeo–Tang War]] * [[Baekje–Tang War]] * [[Silla–Tang War]] * [[Tang–Tibet relations]] * [[Tang campaigns against the Western Turks|Tang–Western Turks War]] ** [[Tang campaign against the oasis states|Oasis states]] ** [[Tang campaign against Karakhoja|Karakhoja]] ** [[Tang campaigns against Karasahr|Karasahr]] ** [[Tang campaign against Kucha|Kucha]] ** [[Conquest of the Western Turks|Conquest]] * [[Battle of Talas]] * [[An Lushan rebellion]] * [[Peace treaty between China and Tibet (783)|Qingshui Treaty]] * [[Niu–Li factional strife]] * [[Changqing Treaty]] * [[Sweet Dew incident]] * [[Nanzhao#Territorial_expansion|Tang-Nanzhao conflicts]] ** [[Tang-Nanzhao conflicts in Annan|Annan]] ** [[Siege of Songping|Songping]] * [[Huang Chao Rebellion]]
|group2 = Government |list2 = * [[Emperor of China|Emperor]] ** [[List of emperors of the Tang dynasty|List]] ** [[House of Li|House]] ** [[Family_tree_of_Chinese_monarchs_(middle)#Tang_and_Wu_Zhou_dynasties|Family tree]] * [[Chancellor of the Tang dynasty|Chancellor]] * [[Administrative divisions of the Tang dynasty|Administrative divisions]] ** [[Jimi system]] ** [[Fanzhen]] *** [[Three Fanzhen of Hebei|Hebei]] * [[Imperial_examination#Tang_dynasty_(618–907)|Imperial examination]]s * [[Tang official headwear|Official headwear]] * [[Military history of the Tang dynasty|Military]] ** [[Jiedushi]] ** [[Imperial Guards (Tang dynasty)|Imperial guards]] ** [[Shence Army]] ** [[Bureau of Military Affairs|Shumiyuan]] ** [[Turks in the Tang military|Turkic generals]]
{{Navbox |child |groupstyle = text-align: center; |group1=[[Three_Departments_and_Six_Ministries#Three_Departments|Three Departments]] |list1= *[[Department of State Affairs]] *[[Zhongshu Sheng|Secretariat]] *[[Menxia Sheng|Chancellery]] *([[Secretariat-Chancellery]])
|group2=[[Three_Departments_and_Six_Ministries#Six_Ministries|Six Ministries]] |list2= # [[Ministry of Personnel]] # [[Ministry of Revenue (imperial China)|Ministry of Revenue]] # [[Ministry of Rites]] # [[Ministry of War (imperial China)|Ministry of War]] # [[Ministry of Justice (imperial China)|Ministry of Justice]] # [[Ministry of Works (imperial China)|Ministry of Works]]
|group3=Protectorates |list3= * [[Tang dynasty in Inner Asia]] ** [[Protectorate General to Pacify the West]] *** [[Four Garrisons of Anxi]] ** [[Beiting Protectorate]] ** [[Protectorate General to Pacify the North]] ** [[Protectorate General to Pacify the South]] ** [[Protectorate General to Pacify the East]] *** [[Ungjin Commandery]] *** [[Gyerim Territory Area Command]] }}
|group3 = Culture |list3 = * [[Tang dynasty art|Art]] * [[Sancai]] * [[Tang poetry|Poetry]] ** ''[[Three Hundred Tang Poems]]'' * [[Playing_card#China|Playing card]] * ''[[A Palace Concert]]'' * ''[[Emperor Taizong Receiving the Tibetan Envoy]]'' * ''[[Huaisu's Autobiography]]'' * ''[[Night-Shining White]]'' * [[Companion statues: Kashyapa and Ananda|Kashyapa & Ananda]] * [[Six Steeds of Zhao Mausoleum]] ** [[Autumn Dew]] * [[Dazu Rock Carvings]] * [[Leshan Giant Buddha]] * [[Rongxian Giant Buddha]] * [[Thousand-Buddha Cliff]]
{{Navbox |child |groupstyle = text-align: center; |group1=Writers |list1= * [[Daoxuan]] (596–667) ** ''[[Standard Design for Buddhist Temple Construction]]'' * [[Empress Zhangsun]] (601–636) * [[Bianji]] (7th c.) ** ''[[Great Tang Records on the Western Regions]]'' * [[Du Huan]] (751–762) * [[Bai Xingjian]] (776–826) ** ''[[The Tale of Li Wa]]'' * [[Lu Yu]] (733–804) ** ''[[The Classic of Tea]]'' * [[Du Guangting]] (850–933) * [[Yang Yunsong]] (9th c.) ** ''[[Green Satchel Classic]]''
|group2=[[Three_Hundred_Tang_Poems#Poets|Poets]] |list2= * [[Luo Binwang]] (619–684) * [[Du Shenyan]] (645–708) * [[Wang Bo (poet)|Wang Bo]] (650–676) * [[Chen Zi'ang]] (656–702) * [[He Zhizhang]] (659–744) * [[Zhang Jiuling]] (673–740) * [[Meng Haoran]] (689–740) * [[Li Qi (poet)|Li Qi]] (690–751) * [[Wang Changling]] (698–756) * [[Wang Wei (Tang dynasty)|Wang Wei]] (699–759) * [[Li Bai]] (701–762) * [[Gao Shi]] (704–765) * [[Liu Zhangqing]] (709–785) * [[Du Fu]] (712–770) * [[Zhang Ji (poet from Hubei)|Zhang Ji]] (712–779) * [[Cen Shen]] (715–770) * [[Li Bi]] (722–789) * [[Wei Yingwu]] (737–792) * [[Lu Lun]] (739–799) * [[Han Yu]] (768–824) * [[Liu Yuxi]] (772–842) * [[Bai Juyi]] (772–846) * [[Liu Zongyuan]] (773–819) * [[Yuan Zhen]] (779–831) * [[Li Ye (poet)|Li Ye]] (d. 784) * [[Li He]] (790–817) * [[Niu Yingzhen]] (8th c.) * [[Zhang Xu]] (8th c.) * [[Du Mu]] (803–852) * [[Wen Tingyun]] (812–866) * [[Li Shangyin]] (813–858) * [[Mo Xuanqing]] (834-?) * [[Yu Xuanji]] (840–868) * [[Du Qiuniang]] (9th c.) * [[Liêu Hữu Phương]] (9th c.) |group3=[[Tang dynasty painting|Painters]] |list3= * [[Yan Liben]] (600–673) * [[Wu Daozi]] (680–760) * [[Wang Wei (Tang dynasty)|Wang Wei]] (699–759) * [[Viśa Īrasangä]] (7th c.) * [[Han Gan]] (706–783) * [[Zhang Xuan]] (713–755) * [[Han Huang]] (723–787) * [[Zhou Fang (Tang dynasty)|Zhou Fang]] (730–780) * [[Guanxiu]] (832–912) * [[Jing Hao]] (855–915) * [[Sun Wei (painter)|Sun Wei]] (9th c.) }}
|group4 = Religion |list4 =
{{Navbox |child |groupstyle = text-align: center; |group1=[[Chinese_Buddhism#Tang_Dynasty_(618–907_CE)|Buddhism]] |list1= * [[Jizang]] (549–623) * [[Daochuo]] (562–645) * [[Shandao]] (613–681) * [[Xuanzang]] (fl 602–664) * [[Kuiji]] (632–682) * [[Yijing (monk)|Yijing]] (635–713) * [[Faru (monk)|Faru]] (638–689) * [[Vajrabodhi]] (671–741) * [[Jianzhen]] (688–763) * [[Amoghavajra]] (705–774) * [[Mazu Daoyi]] (709–788) * [[Baizhang Huaihai]] (720–814) * [[Wukong (monk)|Wukong]] (730–790) * [[Yaoshan Weiyan]] (745–827) * [[Huiguo]] (746–805) * [[Puhua]] (770–860) * [[Zhaozhou Congshen]] (778–897) * [[Zhisheng]] (8th c.) * [[Dongshan Liangjie]] (807–869) * [[Yunmen Wenyan]] (862–949) * [[Gikū]] (9th c.)
|group2=[[History_of_Taoism#Tang_Dynasty_(618–907)|Taoism]] |list2= * [[Cheng Xuanying]] (fl 631–655) * [[Lü Dongbin]] (796-?)
|group3=[[Confucianism]] |list3= * [[Neo-Confucianism]] ** [[Han Yu]] (768–824) ** [[Li Ao (philosopher)|Li Ao]] (772–841) *[[Kong Yingda]] (574–648)
|group4=Other |list4= * [[Church of the East in China|Church of the East]] ** [[Xi'an Stele]] * [[Islam during the Tang dynasty]] * [[Chinese Manichaeism]]
}}
|group5 = [[Science and technology of the Tang dynasty|Science and technology]] |list5 = * [[Wang Xiaotong]] (580–640) ** ''[[Jigu Suanjing]]'' * [[Xu Jingzong]] (592-672) * [[Liang Lingzan]] ** ''The Five-Planet and Twenty-eight Constellation Deities'' * [[Li Chunfeng]] (602–670) ** ''[[Ten Computational Canons]]'' * Su Jing ** ''[[Xinxiu bencao]]'' * [[Sun Simiao]] (d. 682) * [[Yi Xing]] (683–727) * [[Gautama Siddha]] (fl 714–724) ** ''[[Treatise on Astrology of the Kaiyuan Era]]'' * [[Jia Dan]] (730–805) * [[Toothbrush]] * [[Woodblock printing]]
|group6 = Economy |list6 = * [[Diwu Qi]] * [[Liu Yan (Tang dynasty)|Liu Yan]] * [[Kaiyuan Tongbao]] * [[Salt Commission]] * [[Flying cash]]
}}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Tang dynasty templates]] </noinclude>

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
